rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §12.0631, which governs charter school employment termination compliance. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 12.0631. FAILURE TO DISCHARGE OR REFUSE TO HIRE OR TERMINATE OR REFUSE SERVICES FROM CERTAIN EMPLOYEES, APPLICANTS, OR SERVICE PROVIDERS.
_note: Rule text concerns charter school employment matters; no nexus to property tax homestead exemptions.
